title: BEM-847 runner smoke
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
# Smoke after BEM-848: prove Codex Runner still runs with explicit workflow_dispatch and no operator UI relay.
workflow_dir=Path('.github/workflows')
violations=[]
allowed_schedule=['curator-hourly-report.yml']
if workflow_dir.exists():
    for p in sorted(list(workflow_dir.glob('*.yml'))+list(workflow_dir.glob('*.yaml'))):
        txt=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
        name=p.name
        if 'push:' in txt:
            violations.append({'file':str(p),'trigger':'push'})
        if 'issue_comment:' in txt:
            violations.append({'file':str(p),'trigger':'issue_comment'})
        if 'schedule:' in txt and name not in allowed_schedule:
            violations.append({'file':str(p),'trigger':'schedule_not_allowed'})
status='runner_smoke_pass_slots_clean' if not violations else 'runner_smoke_pass_with_trigger_violations'
next_action='verify Claude mailbox/runtime after runner smoke' if not violations else 'remove remaining trigger violations'
state={'bem':'BEM-847','status':status,'trace_id':'bem847_runner_smoke','trigger_violations':violations,'allowed_schedule':allowed_schedule,'created_at':created,'next_action':next_action}
Path('governance/state/bem847_runner_smoke.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem847_runner_smoke.md').write_text('# BEM-847 | Runner Smoke | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-847'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem847_runner_smoke.json','governance/reports/bem847_runner_smoke.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('BEM-847 smoke: explicit Deno workflow_dispatch reached Codex Runner and checked remaining push/issue_comment/schedule trigger violations')
"""
No issue comments.
